message:
feat(fp-io): SqlColumnSchema::comment field for column-level comments (br-cfld / fd90.35)

Add comment: Option<String> to SqlColumnSchema completing
SQLAlchemy.Inspector.get_columns() parity (the dict shape includes
'comment' alongside name/type/nullable/default/primary_key).
Companion to fd90.32's table-level table_comment.

SQLite has no column-comment storage, so the rusqlite table_schema
override unconditionally emits comment=None. PostgreSQL impls
populate from pg_catalog.pg_description.col_description; MySQL uses
information_schema.columns.column_comment; MSSQL reads from
sys.extended_properties.

7 existing SqlColumnSchema struct literal sites bulk-updated with
comment: None. The rusqlite columns.push() site fixed manually
(bulk-update touched it inside a multi-line if-let expression).

2 new tests cover: SQLite returns comment=None even for real
tables; PG-like backend stub returns explicit comment text per
column with mixed Some/None.

379 fp-io tests pass; clippy -D warnings clean across fp-io +
umbrella; ubs Critical=0.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
